title: Haribhakti & Co is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Haribhakti & Co is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Haribhakti & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haribhakti & Co:
Haribhakti & Co is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co!
